message:
perf(raptorq): always use dual-add fast path for c==1 in gf256_addmul_slices2

The c==1 branch gated through should_use_dual_addmul_fused() before
calling gf256_add_slices2(), falling back to two separate add_slice
calls when the fused threshold was not met. But gf256_add_slices2()
already owns the lane-size fallback rules internally, so the outer
gate only suppressed valid XOR fusion windows. Remove the conditional
and always call gf256_add_slices2() directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
